unsupported.message: The Gemma 4 E2B LiteRT-LM direct-source path is profile-driven and uses explicit companion-scale sourceTransform contracts. The official Gemma 4 12B LiteRT-LM package is a different layout: it splits text execution into tf_lite_embedder and tf_lite_prefill_decode TFLiteModel sections and the main graph stores anonymous compiled INT4 constants whose weight-conversion semantics must be mapped from the graph.
unsupported.recommendation: Use the converted RDRR artifact gemma-4-12b-it-text-q4k-ehf16-af32 for WebGPU inference, or add a split-section LiteRT-LM graph adapter with parity evidence before claiming direct LiteRT-LM support for this package.
